title: POST-H-015-E — Quality gate y runbook operacional
commands: python -m devpilot_core schema validate --schema-id PostHManifest --instance docs/post_h_015_e_manifest.json --json
pass_criteria: operator-dashboard-ready is registered in hardening and industrial QualityGate profiles.
python -m devpilot_core operator dashboard --json --write-report generates the snapshot JSON/Markdown under outputs/reports.
The generated snapshot validates against OperatorDashboardSnapshot.
The gate blocks invalid no-go flags or incomplete required sections.
The operational runbook explains state interpretation and verification commands.
block_criteria: The operator dashboard mutates source or runtime state by default.
The quality gate passes with an invalid snapshot or hidden no-go gates.
The CLI recommends remote execution, connector write or plugin execution.
TCR v1/v2, project_state or docs-governance registry drift from POST-H-015-E.
risks: implemented-initial gate; it validates local snapshot readiness but is not a production SRE console.
The full pytest -q regression remains deferred to final backlog/hito validation due cost.
Runtime outputs under outputs/reports must be regenerated locally and are excluded from clean ZIP deliverables.
capabilities: CLI command python -m devpilot_core operator dashboard
